name: todo-electron-tests
description: Test suite for Reminders Electron App

scripts.test:e2e: cd ../todo-electron && npm run build && cd ../todo-electron-tests && playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:ui: cd ../todo-electron && npm run build && cd ../todo-electron-tests && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:all: vitest run && cd ../todo-electron && npm run build && cd ../todo-electron-tests && playwright test
